title: Groundbreaking ceremony for social housing for the People's Public Security forces in Hoa Lu Ward, Ninh Binh
excerpt: On March 28, in Hoa Lu Ward, Ninh Binh Province, the Ministry of Public Security held the groundbreaking ceremony for a social housing project serving the People's Public Security forces.

title: HTL Seaside project inauguration and project plaque ceremony
excerpt: On April 1, HTL Vietnam Real Estate Investment, Construction and Business JSC held the inauguration and project plaque ceremony for the residential area at Land Lot No. 2, east of Hung Vuong Road, Tuy Hoa City.

title: Progress inspection for the social housing project for People's Public Security forces in Hoa Lu Ward, Ninh Binh
excerpt: On the morning of November 14, 2025, at Ninh Binh Provincial Police headquarters, the working delegation reviewed the project implementation progress.
